name: Coinstar Kiosk
description_short: Coinstar operates self-service kiosks offering coin-to-cash conversion, cryptocurrency purchases, gift card exchanges, and account transfers at retail locations nationwide.
description_long:
Coinstar is a long-established operator of self-service kiosks located in retail environments across the United States. The company was recently acquired by Arctic Slope Regional Corporation (ASRC) as of February 2026. Their primary offering is converting loose coins into cash at convenient retail locations, eliminating the need for customers to count, sort, or roll coins manually.

Beyond coin conversion, Coinstar kiosks now provide an expanding suite of financial services. These include eGift Card exchanges (with some no-fee options), cryptocurrency purchases through partnerships with Coinme and their CINQ by Coinstar platform, Amazon Cash loading, direct charity donations, account transfers to checking accounts, and a proprietary CINQ debit card. The company explicitly states they do not exchange gift cards or foreign currency. Most services require downloading a companion mobile app before visiting a kiosk.

Coinstar distinguishes itself through the ubiquity and accessibility of its kiosk network at grocery stores and retail locations, offering immediate service without appointment scheduling. The multi-service model converts what was traditionally a coin-exchange business into a broader financial services platform, including cryptocurrency access and account funding options. Their partnership ecosystem (Amazon, U.S. Bank, Zero Hash, Coinme) extends their service reach.

The primary limitation is that this is strictly a kiosk-based, self-service model with no human customer support at the point of transaction. Fees vary by location and service type, which creates pricing uncertainty. The requirement to download apps before visiting adds friction for less tech-savvy users. While positioned as a financial services platform, Coinstar fundamentally remains a cash-access and conversion utility rather than a full-service financial institution.
pros: Coin-to-cash conversion requires no counting, sorting, or rolling — immediate conversion at retail locations
No-fee eGift Card options available for gift card exchanges
Cryptocurrency access integrated at kiosks through Coinme and CINQ platforms
Amazon Cash integration allows adding funds to Amazon accounts directly without credit/debit cards
Charity donation option lets customers direct loose change to participating nonprofits
Account transfer service enables direct deposit to checking accounts, bypassing bank lines
Widespread retail location network for convenient access (grocery stores and retail partners)
cons: Fees vary by location for coin conversion and most services, creating price uncertainty before transaction
Does not accept foreign currency or exchange gift cards despite broad service positioning
Requires downloading mobile apps before visiting for cryptocurrency, Amazon Cash, and account transfer services
Self-service kiosk model with no human support available for transaction issues or questions
Cryptocurrency and cash services depend on third-party partnerships (Coinme, Zero Hash), limiting direct control
best_for: Consumers with significant loose coin accumulation seeking quick conversion without bank visits
Tech-comfortable users interested in cryptocurrency purchases at physical retail locations
Amazon shoppers without credit/debit cards who want to load cash balance directly
Individuals comfortable with self-service, app-based transaction models at retail kiosks
diagnosis: Coinstar is best for consumers seeking convenient coin-to-cash conversion at retail locations or those interested in cryptocurrency purchases via kiosk. The primary caveat is that all services are self-service kiosk-based with variable fees by location, and cryptocurrency/cash services require app setup before visiting, making it less suitable for users preferring human interaction or simpler transactions.
services: eGift Card exchanges with variable and no-fee options
CINQ by Coinstar cryptocurrency conversion (25+ crypto options)
Transfer to Account (direct deposit to checking accounts)
Multiple financial institution partnerships for account transfers
